href='https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/177055996?u=cb497e1edb10d059b285288c93ff32dab53af1c3&v=4&size=180'><script>window.addEventListener('load',function(){if(window.Prism){Prism.plugins.autoloader.languages_path='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/prismjs@1.29.0/components/';Prism.highlightAll();}if(window.mermaid){mermaid.initialize({startOnLoad:false,securityLevel:'loose',theme:document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-color-mode')==='dark'?'dark':'default'});document.querySelectorAll('pre>code.language-mermaid,code.language-mermaid').forEach(function(code){var block=document.createElement('div');block.className='mermaid';block.textContent=code.textContent.trim();(code.parentElement&&code.parentElement.tagName==='PRE'?code.parentElement:code).replaceWith(block);});if(mermaid.run){mermaid.run({querySelector:'.mermaid'});}else style: <style>#postBody{font-size:18px;line-height:1.9;max-width:100%;counter-reset:h2}#postBody h1{color:#f0b429!important;font-weight:900!important;border-bottom:2px solid rgba(240,180,41,0.4);padding-bottom:10px;margin-bottom:20px}#postBody h2,#postBody h3,#postBody h4{color:#0969da;font-weight:bold}#postBody h2{border-left:5px solid #0969da;padding-left:12px;background:rgba(9,105,218,0.05);padding-top:4px;padding-bottom:4px;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0}#postBody h2::before{counter-increment:h2;content:counter(h2)". ";color:#0969da}#postBody strong{color:#f0b429;font-weight:bold}#postBody a{color:#f0b429;text-decoration:none}#postBody a:hover{text-decoration:underline}#postBody img{display:block;margin:0 auto;max-width:100%;border-radius:8px;cursor:zoom-in}#postBody pre{background:#f6f8fa;border-radius:10px;overflow-x:auto}#postBody code{background:#f0f0f0;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 6px;font-size:0.9em;color:#d73a49;font-weight:bold}#postBody pre code{background:none;padding:0;color:inherit;font-weight:normal}#postBody blockquote{position:relative;border-left:4px solid #0969da;background:rgba(9,105,218,0.05);padding:18px 20px 18px 28px;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;margin:1.5em 0;color:#555}#postBody table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:1.5em 0;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden}#postBody th{background:rgba(9,105,218,0.1);padding:12px;color:#0969da;font-weight:bold}#postBody td{padding:12px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.05)}#postBody tr:nth-child(even){background:rgba(0,0,0,0.02)}#postBody tr:hover{background:rgba(9,105,218,0.05)}#postBody hr{border:0;height:2px;background:#0969da;margin:2.5em 0;opacity:0.2}.avatar{cursor:pointer;animation:none!important;transform:none!important}a.Label{transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s}a.Label:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)}.archive-page #postBody{max-width:700px}</style>
indexStyle: <style>.post-item{transition:transform 0.32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1),box-shadow 0.32s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);border-radius:14px;padding:0;border:none;background:#fff;position:relative;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 2px 12px rgba(130,80,223,0.08);display:flex;flex-direction:column}.post-item:nth-child(4n+1){border-left:4px solid #8250df}.post-item:nth-child(4n+2){border-left:4px solid #0969da}.post-item:nth-child(4n+3){border-left:4px solid #ff6b9d}.post-item:nth-child(4n+0){border-left:4px solid #f0b429}.post-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:14px;padding:2px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#8250df,#f0b429,#ff6b9d);-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.32s;z-index:1;pointer-events:none}.post-item:hover{transform:translateY(-8px) scale(1.012);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(130,80,223,0.22),0 0 0 2px rgba(130,80,223,0.18),0 0 24px 2px rgba(130,80,223,0.1)}.post-item:hover::before{opacity:1}.post-item-thumb{width:100%;height:160px;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px 10px 0 0;display:block}.post-item-thumb-placeholder{width:100%;height:160px;border-radius:10px 10px 0 0;display:block}.post-item-body{padding:18px 20px}.avatar{box-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(130,80,223,0.4);transition:box-shadow 0.3s,transform 0.3s}.avatar:hover{box-shadow:0 0 25px rgba(130,80,223,0.8)}.footer{text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#888;margin-top:2rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid #eee}@keyframes fadeInUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}.post-item{animation:fadeInUp 0.5s ease both}.color-fg-muted.mt-2{display:none}.blogTitle,.blogTitle h1,.blogTitle a{font-weight:900!important;font-size:2rem!important;letter-spacing:1px;color:#fff!important;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}</style>
